title: anthurium scandens subsp. pusillum
intro: Anthurium scandens subsp. pusillum, also known as the Pusillanthus, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family (Araceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Anthurium scandens subsp. pusillum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate pain and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
